name: Logify
absorption_note: Rust structured logging framework with zero-cost abstraction; 18 branches, 125KB. Target: pheno monorepo as crates/logify (or absorbed into PhenoObservability per ADR-035A).
note: Audited 2026-07-17; structured logging framework. May overlap with PhenoObservability tracing/logging. Verify before merge — could be MERGE-INTO-PO instead of standalone crate.
